summary: Iteration 51: Verified push notification crash prevention code structure and responsive UI layouts. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - chart component sizing issue on initial load (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: push.js line 32-36: setTimeout(() => {...}, 3000) - 3-second delay for native push init VERIFIED
push.js line 47-53: try/catch around dynamic import of @capacitor/push-notifications VERIFIED
push.js line 56-62: try/catch around checkPermissions() with (non-fatal) message VERIFIED
push.js line 65-71: try/catch around requestPermissions() with (non-fatal) message VERIFIED
push.js line 81-86: try/catch around register() with (non-fatal) message VERIFIED
push.js line 11,19,38,41: pushInitialized flag prevents re-init after failure VERIFIED
RestaurantManagement.js line 630: Stats grid 'grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4' - 2 cols mobile, 4 cols desktop VERIFIED
RestaurantManagement.js line 686: Card layout 'flex flex-col sm:flex-row' - stacks on mobile VERIFIED
PlatformDashboard.js line 87: Stats grid 'grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4' - 2 cols mobile, 4 cols large screens VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified: (1) Push notification service has 3-second setTimeout delay, individual try/catch on import/checkPermissions/requestPermissions/register, and pushInitialized flag. Browser mode correctly logs '[Push] Running in browser. Using in-app notifications only.' (2) Platform Dashboard stats grid uses grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 - shows 2 columns on mobile. (3) Businesses page (/restaurants) stats grid uses grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 - shows 2 columns on mobile. Restaurant cards use flex-col sm:flex-row - stack vertically on mobile showing all info (name, address, phone, email, modules, price). (4) Settings > User Management shows staff names clearly on mobile with proper card layout.

push_notification_individual_try_catch.evidence: push.js has separate try/catch for: import (47-53), checkPermissions (56-62), requestPermissions (65-71), register (81-86)

push_notification_initialized_flag.evidence: push.js line 11: let pushInitialized = false; line 19: if (pushInitialized) return; line 38,41: pushInitialized = true

push_notification_browser_mode.evidence: Console log: '[Push] Running in browser. Using in-app notifications only.'

platform_dashboard_stats_2_col_mobile.evidence: PlatformDashboard.js line 87: grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. Screenshot shows 2-column layout at 430px

businesses_page_stats_2_col_mobile.evidence: RestaurantManagement.js line 630: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4. Screenshot shows 2-column layout at 430px

businesses_page_cards_flex_col_mobile.evidence: RestaurantManagement.js line 686: flex flex-col sm:flex-row. Mobile screenshot shows stacked layout with all info visible

businesses_page_card_info_visible_mobile.evidence: Mobile screenshot shows: business name, address, phone, email, modules (POS, KDS, QR ORDERING, WORKFORCE), price

user_management_staff_names_visible_mobi.evidence: Mobile screenshot shows staff names clearly: restaurant_admin, user, new_admin, SKAdmin, test_staff_1775934819
